de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Class Debug

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.Debug
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DebugMBean

    public final class Debug
extends Object
implements DebugMBean

      prints the given string followed by the boolean if in debug mode.
      static void out(String msg, long id)
      prints the given string followed by the int if in debug mode.
      static void out(String msg, long id1, long id2)
      prints the given string followed by the int if in debug mode.
      static void out(String msg, Object obj)
      prints given string and the result of calling the toString method of of the given obj if in debug mode.
      static void out(String msg, Object obj1, Object obj2)
      prints given string and the result of calling the toString method of of the given objects if in debug mode.
      static void out(String msg, Object obj1, Object obj2, Object obj3)
      prints given string and the result of calling the toString method of of the given objects if in debug mode.
      static void out(String msg, Throwable exc)
      prints the given string followed by the stacktrace of the throwable object.
      static void outIfEqual(String msg, boolean cond)
      prints given string, if the condition cond is true
      static void outIfEqual(String msg, Object obj1, Object obj2)
      prints given string, if calling the equal method of obj1, with obj2 as argument results in true

      Prints a stack trace (without influencing the execution in any way).

    • Field Detail

      • ENABLE_ASSERTION

        public static boolean ENABLE_ASSERTION
        has to be set in order to enable assertion

      • ENABLE_DEBUG

        public static boolean ENABLE_DEBUG
        has to be set in order to enable debugging

      • showOnlyPrefixes

        public static String[] showOnlyPrefixes
        Using the command line switch "-Dkey.debug.prefix" one can choose of which classes the debug output is to be send to the standard output. For example: runProver -Dkey.debug.prefix=de.uka.ilkd.key.java,de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.ProblemLoader will display all debug outputs either coming from package de...java (or any subpackage) or from the class ProblemLoader. Stacktraces will always be printed. The colon as splitting character is supported for legacy reasons.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Debug

        public Debug()

    • Method Detail

      • out

        public static void out(String msg)
        prints given string if in debug mode
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed

      • out

        public static void out(String msg,
                       Throwable exc)
        prints the given string followed by the stacktrace of the throwable object. If it is null, nothing is printed.
        Parameters:
        msg - message to be printed
        exc - a throwable object

      • out

        public static final void out(String msg,
                             Object obj)
        prints given string and the result of calling the toString method of of the given obj if in debug mode. The advantage of calling the toString here and not before is that if debug mode is disabled no string computation is done
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed
        obj - the Object where to call the toString method

      • out

        public static final void out(String msg,
                             Object obj1,
                             Object obj2)
        prints given string and the result of calling the toString method of of the given objects if in debug mode. The advantage of calling the toString here and not before is that if debug mode is disabled no string computation is done
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed
        obj1 - the first Object where to call the toString method
        obj2 - the second Object where to call the toString method

      • out

        public static final void out(String msg,
                             Object obj1,
                             Object obj2,
                             Object obj3)
        prints given string and the result of calling the toString method of of the given objects if in debug mode. The advantage of calling the toString here and not before is that if debug mode is disabled no string computation is done
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed
        obj1 - the first Object where to call the toString method
        obj2 - the second Object where to call the toString method
        obj3 - the third Object where to call the toString method

      • out

        public static final void out(String msg,
                             long id)
        prints the given string followed by the int if in debug mode.
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed
        id - the int printed after msg

      • out

        public static final void out(String msg,
                             long id1,
                             long id2)
        prints the given string followed by the int if in debug mode.
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed
        id1 - the int printed first after msg
        id2 - the int printed second after msg

      • out

        public static final void out(String msg,
                             boolean b)
        prints the given string followed by the boolean if in debug mode.
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed
        b - the boolean printed after msg

      • outIfEqual

        public static final void outIfEqual(String msg,
                                    boolean cond)
        prints given string, if the condition cond is true
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed
        cond - the boolean deciding if the message is printed or not

      • outIfEqual

        public static final void outIfEqual(String msg,
                                    Object obj1,
                                    Object obj2)
        prints given string, if calling the equal method of obj1, with obj2 as argument results in true
        Parameters:
        msg - the String to be printed
        obj1 - the Object where to call the equals method
        obj2 - the Object given to as parameter of the equals method of obj1

      • out

        public static final void out(Exception e)
        prints the stack trace if in debug mode

      • printStackTrace

        public static final void printStackTrace(Throwable e)

      • assertTrue

        public static final void assertTrue(boolean isOK)
        an assertion failure is thrown if isOK is evaluated to false
        Parameters:
        isOK - boolean the assertion that is checked

      • assertFalse

        public static final void assertFalse(boolean isNotOK)

      • assertTrue

        public static final void assertTrue(boolean isOK,
                                    String message)
        an assertion failure is thrown if isOK is evaluated to false the text in message is handed over to this exception
        Parameters:
        isOK - boolean the assertion that is checked
        message - String describes the failed assertion

      • assertTrue

        public static final void assertTrue(boolean isOK,
                                    String message,
                                    Object parameter)
        an assertion failure is thrown if isOK is evaluated to false the text in message is handed over to this exception
        Parameters:
        isOK - boolean the assertion that is checked
        message - String describes the failed assertion

      • assertDeepNonNull

        public static final void assertDeepNonNull(Iterable<?> iterable,
                                           String message)
        an assertion failure is thrown if an iterable object is either null or contains the null element.
        Parameters:
        iterable - The iterable object to check
        message - String describes the failed assertion

      • assertFalse

        public static final void assertFalse(boolean isNotOK,
                                     String message)

      • fail

        public static final void fail()

      • fail

        public static final void fail(String message)

      • fail

        public static final void fail(String message,
                              Object o)

      • dbgPrint

        private static final void dbgPrint(String string)
        print a string to stdout, prefixed by the execution context of the caller of the calling function. If showOnlyPrefixes is defined, the output is only written, if the caller prefix begins with one of the specified strings
        Parameters:
        string - string to be printed out

      • printStackTrace

        public static final void printStackTrace()
        Prints a stack trace (without influencing the execution in any way).

      • stackTrace

        public static String stackTrace()

      • getClassAndMethod

        public static String getClassAndMethod()
        return information about the current execution context (and line number if available) as a string. It the same as in the exception stack traces and composed like 
             de.uka.package.ClassName.methodName(ClassName.java:123)
        It uses the context of the calling method.
        Returns:
        a String giving information about the stack of the calling function.

      • getClassAndMethod

        private static String getClassAndMethod(int level)
        return information about some execution context. The context of interest may have appeared several levels higher.
        Parameters:
        level - to go up in the context hierarchy
        Returns:
        a String giving information about the stack of the calling function.

      • setDebugState

        public void setDebugState(boolean debug)
        Description copied from interface: DebugMBean
        set the current debug state. If set to true, debug messages are printed to stdout.
        Specified by:
        setDebugState in interface DebugMBean
        Parameters:
        debug - the new debug state to set

      • getDebugState

        public boolean getDebugState()
        Description copied from interface: DebugMBean
        get the current debug state. If true, messages are printed, if false, no message gets printed.
        Specified by:
        getDebugState in interface DebugMBean
        Returns:
        the current debug state

      • getShowOnlyPrefixes

        public String getShowOnlyPrefixes()
        Description copied from interface: DebugMBean
        get the list of prefixes for which messages are shown. Every message is prefixed with the class name that triggered it. Only if the classname begins with one entry of this list, the message will be displayed-
        Specified by:
        getShowOnlyPrefixes in interface DebugMBean
        Returns:
        a ":"-separated list of prefixes

      • setShowOnlyPrefixes

        public void setShowOnlyPrefixes(String showOnlyPrefixes)
        Description copied from interface: DebugMBean
        set the list of prefixes for which messages are shown. Every message is prefixed with the class name that triggered it. Only if the classname begins with one entry of this list, the message will be displayed-
        Specified by:
        setShowOnlyPrefixes in interface DebugMBean
        Parameters:
        showOnlyPrefixes - a ":"-separated list of prefixes
